QF.id: VI Public Offering and Corporate Actions_25

question.text: What is the time duration from issue closure to listing in case of an equity IPO?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The time duration from issue closure to listing in case of equity IPO has been reduced to 3 working days. **The Trap:** Earlier the listing timeline was longer, so 5 or 7 days might seem correct based on old knowledge. **Cross-Exam Context:** IPO listing timelines are tested in NISM Series VI and Series IX. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The T+3 listing timeline means investors get their allotment or refund quickly, reducing the opportunity cost of blocked funds.
